name: Gasnator
short_description: You are hero super soldier Gasnator. Kill and destroy different enemies and find magic crystal in different areas
detailed_description:
FIND HMUR!


About the Game

Game story:


You are super soldier called Gasnator. Enemy army has hidden 15 crystals to different locations like space, western,cities etc. Your mission is to destroy enemies and find those hidden crystals. There are several enemies like soldiers, flying enemies, turrets without shields and with energy shields. Player has 3 different weapons and also grenades. During levels player can collect more ammos and more health packs. Also player can explode several explosion barrels which could destroy several enemies. So be a super soldier and find all hidden crystals.

Features::

- 16 different low poly style areas
- Melee fight
- Weapons: Rifle, Grenade launcher, Submachine
- Grenades
- Collect more ammos and health pick-ups
- Several enemies: Soldiers with weapons, Flying enemies with radar system, Turret without shield and powerful turrets with enerfy shield
- Steam Achievements
